zh.lifeSummary: 當Abria or alice Hovel於1577年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍莫斯費爾德時，她的父親William Hovel22歲，母親Mrs William Hovel18歲。她於大約1592年與Nathaniel Fiske在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國素福爾可維布亞德，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abria or alice Hovel于1577年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可霍莫斯費爾德时，她的父亲William Hovel22岁，母亲Mrs William Hovel18岁。她于大约1592年与Nathaniel Fiske在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国素福爾可維布亞德，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Hovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (Hövel): topographic name for someone living on or near a small hill, from Middle Low German hovel ‘hill, hump’, or a habitational name from Hövel in North Rhine-Westphalia. Compare Heuvel and Hoevel .
Scottish and English: variant of   Havill  .

variants.name: Heuvel
meanings: Dutch (mainly Van den Heuvel): topographic name for someone living on or near a small hill, from Dutch heuvel ‘mound, small hill’. Compare Vandenheuvel .
North German: variant of Hövel (see Hovel ), a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Abria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Rare feminine form of   Adrian  , recorded in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Abria or alice Hovel was born in 1577, in Homersfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Hovel, was 22 and her mother, Mrs William Hovel, was 18. She married Nathaniel Fiske about 1592, in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in Weybread, Suffolk, England, and was buried in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abria or alice Hovel est née en 1577, à Homersfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hovel, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Hovel, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Fiske environ 1592, à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abria or alice Hovel 1577 in Homersfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Hovel 22 und ihre Mutter Mrs William Hovel 18. Sie hat um 1592 in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Nathaniel Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Weybread, Suffolk, England und wurde in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abria or alice Hovel è nata il nel 1577 nel Homersfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Hovel, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mrs William Hovel, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Nathaniel Fiske circa 1592, nel Weybread, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel Weybread, Suffolk, England, e fu sepolta a Weybread, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Abria or alice Hovelが1577年にイギリスイギリススフォルクホーメルスフィールドで生まれた時，父William Hovelは22歳，母Mrs William Hovelは18歳であった。約1592年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエイブレアドでNathaniel Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススフォルクウエイブレアドで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウエイブレアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Abria or alice Hovel(이)가 1577년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홈르스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hovel(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Hovel(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드에서 Nathaniel Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 수폴크 w이브리드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abria or alice Hovel nasceu em 1577, em Homersfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Hovel, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs William Hovel, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Fiske aproximadamente 1592, em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abria or alice Hovel родилась в 1577 г. в местности хомирсфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Hovel было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Hovel, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Fiske около 1592 г. в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия и была похоронена в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abria or alice Hovel nació en 1577, en Homersfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Hovel, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs William Hovel, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Fiske aproximadamente 1592, en Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
